violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee observed washing hands in a warewash sink. Food employee was observed washing his hands in the wash basin of the 3 compartment sink. Hands should only be washed using the designated sink for hand washing.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. Thermometer calibration log was not available during inspection. Thermometer calibration log should be completed weekly, according to HACCP plan.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
